TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ye-hanlow-ke, title = Ye-hanlow-ke, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ye-hanlow-ke} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ye-han.low-ke "Ing a kamu John Locke, 1632 a mihca 8 a bulad 29 a demiad katukuh 1704 a mihca 10 a bulad 28 a demiad, FRS" singanganay Ing-kow ce-sye-cya, u pakaliliday u salingatuay ce-sye-cya, ahebal ku nipatinaku tu tekeday nizateng a wama. i tinengan, ci Low-ke atu ci Cyaw-ce.Peyke-ley,Ta-wi.Siw-mu tatulu a tademawan pala nu Ing-kow nitanengan a nizateng nu situngusay a tademaw, namahiza ci Low-ke i sakay a katatelekan mikawaw tu kahenulan a sapaayawan. palahad ciniza tu caca tuci Tang-ma-s.how-pu-s nu mahizaay a waway cayay kalecad ku nizateng, sakaku ku cen-hu uyza dada' maala ku pihang a sakuwan, asaca midiput tu tademaw amin a izaw ku uzip, sakaku, atu zaysangan pakuniza a situngusa, kya tatenga'ay situngu. . Low-ke patatenga' uyza pakala tu pihang a sapikuwan hawsa, syakay a katatelek kya patizeng, anu cangu'ut tu mahiniay a pihang, mahiza u tademaw a situngus pabelin tu cen-hu. Ye-han.low-ke u keynli nu kanatal pala hulickinen, sin-cen keyn atu hekalay keyn, sakaku sa pababenis patizeng tu hulic keyn atu sin-cen keyn, palalecad tu sin-cen keyn atu hekalay keyn, hulic keyn u satalakaway a keyli nu kanatal. . nikauzipan 1632 a mihca 8 a bulad 29 a demiad, Low-ke-sen i Sa-mu-say-te-cyun a Wi-lin-tun a niyazu', cacay u laed tu Pu-li-s-tow pakala tu 12 ing-li a kakitizaan. uyzaan demian masu-li. Low-ke a wama ci Ye-han.Low-ke ku ngnangan, Sa-mu-say-te-cyun mala tizaay ba-kown-su-ci a binkusi, na i Ing-kow kalalais mala u tatengilan a kapu nu mikuwanay tu hitay. Low-ke a wina ci Ay-ni-s.cin-en nu misanga'ay tu bukul a tataynaan a wawa, kukamu salungan sa,ux babalaki ni Low-ke hatu u cin-cyaw-tu. cay katenes lecuhan ci Low-ke, malimad kuheni tayza i Pu-li-s-tow sastimulan tu 7 ing-liay a Pung-s-bu-te-a niyazu', itiza i malukay a niyazu' balaki ci Low-ke. 1647 a mihcaan, i cabay nu wama, u tatengilan nu giing Ya-li-san-ta.Pow-pu-mu a pipadang tu kalisiw, ci Low-ke mapatayza i Lon-tun Si-mey micudad "Wi-s-mey-te" a cung-sye "Westminster School". Makay Si-mey cung-sye pahezek, Low-ke kilul pasayza micudad i Niw-cin talakaway a cacudadan ciwlu sye-yen. 1656 a mihcaan, ci Low-ke pakala tu sye-s-sye-wiy, kilul i 1658 a mihcaan pakala tu su-s-sye-wiy. tiza i Niw-cin katuud ku minanamay migingkiway tu imelang. asaca nakatuud ku singanganay a keseycye mahizaay ci Low-pow-te.Powi-al,Low-pow-te.Bud-ke kapulung a kawaw, 1656 a mihcaan ci Low-ke pakala tu i-sye-sye-s a sye-uyw. i 1666 a mihcaan, ci Low-ke amatineng tu ci Sa-bu-paw-pow-li-pow-cyean, ci Pow-cye itawya mangelu' kalalid nu atay a imelang, milayap tu pisapinang mingaay tu imelang ci Low-ke amikukay, uyzasa misungaay ci Low-kean mala u midapay niza. makilim tu ni Low-ke ku baluhay a sakawawan i 1667 a mihcaan malimad tayza Sa-bu-paw Pow-li-Pow-cye i Lun-tun a enengan, mala tekeday a misaydan ciniza. i Lun-tun, ci Low-ke i singanganan a misaydan ci Tang-ma-s. Si-te-na-mu a pipasubana' lalid sa migingkiw micuda tu i-cye, ci Si-te-lay-mu sakay ci Low-kean i pakuniza ce-syean a nizateng tabaki ku nikalilid, mahiniay a kalilid taneng i zikuz nisulitan ni Low-ke tu "amatineng tu tademawan a kamu" a cudad maazih. kapahay a cabay ni Low-ke ci Ma-sa-mu a tatayna mitakus ci Low-kean tayza i Ay-say-ke-s inakaay kakitizaay mueneng niza. kanahatu itawya uzip ni Low-ke namahiwhiw atahkal caay ka dungdung ku adada, mahiza tu u mala huy-ke-tang iyung a tademaw ciniza. uyni a demiadan ci Low-ke hina aci Ay-sa-ke.Niw-tun a tademawan matatengil tu cacanan a kamuan. makay 2691 a mihcaan malingatu ci Low-ke itiza i luma' ni Ma-sa a tataynaan. tuya a demiadan, u uzip ni Low-ke mangalengaleb pihaceng tu, zikuz i 1704 a mihca 10 a bulad 28 a demiad mumulay, tadem han i Ay-say-le-s-cyun sawalian nu Hay-bow-la-bow adidi'ay a niyazu' cacay nu kitizaan nu kiwkayay a tadem. tahazikuz caay ka siacawa, inayi' ku nisubelid tu canacana a wawaan. kanahatu nikauzipan ni Low-ke milihuza tu Wang-cen-bu-pi, Lon-tun tabakiay a libung yadah ku nu likisi a kawaw, mahiza caay kaletep niza ku nikauzipan a mihcaan maazih niza ku nizatengan amakawaw. Hungti pahulic leke atu tatengilan nu binawlan leke mapalahad i Low-kw a zidayan u saayaway amin a nangatuan. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == j…ô-ńßan.r~…ĺow-k…ô "iŇč a kamu *ońßn r~…ĺo ¶k…ô, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, f*s" siŇčaŇčanaj iŇč-kow ¶…ô-sj…ô- ¶ja, u pakar~…ĺir~…ĺidaj u sar~…ĺiŇčatuaj ¶…ô-sj…ô- ¶ja, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku nipatinaku tu t…ôk…ôdaj nizat…ôŇč a wama. i tin…ôŇčan, ¶i r~…ĺow-k…ô atu ¶i ¶jaw- ¶…ô.p…ôk…ô-r~…ĺ…ô,ta-wi.siw-mu tatur~…ĺu a tad…ômawan par~…ĺa nu iŇč-kow nitan…ôŇčan a nizat…ôŇč nu situŇčusaj a tad…ômaw, namańßiza ¶i r~…ĺow-k…ô i sakaj a katat…ôr~…ĺ…ôkan mikawaw tu kańß…ônur~…ĺan a sapaajawan. par~…ĺańßad ¶iniza tu ¶a ¶a tu ¶i taŇč-ma-s.ńßow-pu-s nu mańßizaaj a wawaj ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nizat…ôŇč, sakaku ku ¶…ôn-ńßu ujza dada Ē~ ° maar~…ĺa ku pińßaŇč a sakuwan, asa ¶a midiput tu tad…ômaw amin a izaw ku uzip, sakaku, atu zajsaŇčan pakuniza a situŇčusa, kja tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj situŇču. . r~…ĺow-k…ô patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ujza pakar~…ĺa tu pińßaŇč a sapikuwan ńßawsa, sjakaj a katat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk kja patiz…ôŇč, anu ¶aŇču Ē~ °ut tu mańßiniaj a pińßaŇč, mańßiza u tad…ômaw a situŇčus pab…ôr~…ĺin tu ¶…ôn-ńßu. j…ô-ńßan.r~…ĺow-k…ô u k…ônr~…ĺi nu kanatar~…ĺ par~…ĺa ńßur~…ĺi ¶kin…ôn, sin- ¶…ôn k…ôn atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj k…ôn, sakaku sa pabab…ônis patiz…ôŇč tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ k…ôn atu sin- ¶…ôn k…ôn, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu sin- ¶…ôn k…ôn atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj k…ôn, ńßur~…ĺi ¶ k…ôn u satar~…ĺakawaj a k…ôr~…ĺi nu kanatar~…ĺ. . nikauzipan **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, r~…ĺow-k…ô-s…ôn i sa-mu-saj-t…ô- ¶jun a wi-r~…ĺin-tun a nijazu Ē~ °, ¶a ¶aj u r~…ĺa…ôd tu pu-r~…ĺi-s-tow pakar~…ĺa tu ** iŇč-r~…ĺi a kakitizaan. ujzaan d…ômian masu-r~…ĺi. r~…ĺow-k…ô a wama ¶i j…ô-ńßan.r~…ĺow-k…ô ku ŇčnaŇčan, sa-mu-saj-t…ô- ¶jun mar~…ĺa tizaaj ba-kown-su- ¶i a binkusi, na i iŇč-kow kar~…ĺar~…ĺais mar~…ĺa u tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan a kapu nu mikuwanaj tu ńßitaj. r~…ĺow-k…ô a wina ¶i aj-ni-s. ¶in-…ôn nu misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu bukur~…ĺ a tatajnaan a wawa, kukamu sar~…ĺuŇčan sa,u* babar~…ĺaki ni r~…ĺow-k…ô ńßatu u ¶in- ¶jaw-tu. ¶aj kat…ôn…ôs r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶i r~…ĺow-k…ô, mar~…ĺimad kuńß…ôni tajza i pu-r~…ĺi-s-tow sastimur~…ĺan tu * iŇč-r~…ĺiaj a puŇč-s-bu-t…ô-a nijazu Ē~ °, itiza i mar~…ĺukaj a nijazu Ē~ ° bar~…ĺaki ¶i r~…ĺow-k…ô. **** a mińß ¶aan, i ¶abaj nu wama, u tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan nu giiŇč ja-r~…ĺi-san-ta.pow-pu-mu a pipadaŇč tu kar~…ĺisiw, ¶i r~…ĺow-k…ô mapatajza i r~…ĺon-tun si-m…ô mi ¶udad "wi-s-m…ô-t…ô" a ¶uŇč-sj…ô "w…ôstminst…ôr s ¶ńßoor~…ĺ". makaj si-m…ô ¶uŇč-sj…ô pańß…ôz…ôk, r~…ĺow-k…ô kir~…ĺur~…ĺ pasajza mi ¶udad i niw- ¶in tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan ¶iwr~…ĺu sj…ô-j…ôn. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i r~…ĺow-k…ô pakar~…ĺa tu sj…ô-s-sj…ô-wij, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ i **** a mińß ¶aan pakar~…ĺa tu su-s-sj…ô-wij. tiza i niw- ¶in katuud ku minanamaj migiŇčkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. asa ¶a nakatuud ku siŇčaŇčanaj a k…ôs…ô ¶j…ô mańßizaaj ¶i r~…ĺow-pow-t…ô.powi-ar~…ĺ,r~…ĺow-pow-t…ô.bud-k…ô kapur~…ĺuŇč a kawaw, **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i r~…ĺow-k…ô pakar~…ĺa tu i-sj…ô-sj…ô-s a sj…ô-ujw. i **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i r~…ĺow-k…ô amatin…ôŇč tu ¶i sa-bu-paw-pow-r~…ĺi-pow- ¶j…ôan, ¶i pow- ¶j…ô itawja maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° kar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu ataj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, mir~…ĺajap tu pisapinaŇč miŇčaaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶i r~…ĺow-k…ô amikukaj, ujzasa misuŇčaaj ¶i r~…ĺow-k…ôan mar~…ĺa u midapaj niza. makir~…ĺim tu ni r~…ĺow-k…ô ku bar~…ĺuńßaj a sakawawan i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺimad tajza sa-bu-paw pow-r~…ĺi-pow- ¶j…ô i r~…ĺun-tun a …ôn…ôŇčan, mar~…ĺa t…ôk…ôdaj a misajdan ¶iniza. i r~…ĺun-tun, ¶i r~…ĺow-k…ô i siŇčaŇčanan a misajdan ¶i taŇč-ma-s. si-t…ô-na-mu a pipasubana Ē~ ° r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa migiŇčkiw mi ¶uda tu i- ¶j…ô, ¶i si-t…ô-r~…ĺaj-mu sakaj ¶i r~…ĺow-k…ôan i pakuniza ¶…ô-sj…ôan a nizat…ôŇč tabaki ku nikar~…ĺir~…ĺid, mańßiniaj a kar~…ĺir~…ĺid tan…ôŇč i zikuz nisur~…ĺitan ni r~…ĺow-k…ô tu "amatin…ôŇč tu tad…ômawan a kamu" a ¶udad maazińß. kapańßaj a ¶abaj ni r~…ĺow-k…ô ¶i ma-sa-mu a tatajna mitakus ¶i r~…ĺow-k…ôan tajza i aj-saj-k…ô-s inakaaj kakitizaaj mu…ôn…ôŇč niza. kanańßatu itawja uzip ni r~…ĺow-k…ô namańßiwńßiw atańßkar~…ĺ ¶aaj ka duŇčduŇč ku adada, mańßiza tu u mar~…ĺa ńßuj-k…ô-taŇč ijuŇč a tad…ômaw ¶iniza. ujni a d…ômiadan ¶i r~…ĺow-k…ô ńßina a ¶i aj-sa-k…ô.niw-tun a tad…ômawan matat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu ¶a ¶anan a kamuan. makaj **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu ¶i r~…ĺow-k…ô itiza i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ni ma-sa a tatajnaan. tuja a d…ômiadan, u uzip ni r~…ĺow-k…ô maŇčar~…ĺ…ôŇčar~…ĺ…ôb pińßa ¶…ôŇč tu, zikuz i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mumur~…ĺaj, tad…ôm ńßan i aj-saj-r~…ĺ…ô-s- ¶jun sawar~…ĺian nu ńßaj-bow-r~…ĺa-bow adidi Ē~ °aj a nijazu Ē~ ° ¶a ¶aj nu kitizaan nu kiwkajaj a tad…ôm. tańßazikuz ¶aaj ka sia ¶awa, inaji Ē~ ° ku nisub…ôr~…ĺid tu ¶ana ¶ana a wawaan. kanańßatu nikauzipan ni r~…ĺow-k…ô mir~…ĺińßuza tu waŇč- ¶…ôn-bu-pi, r~…ĺon-tun tabakiaj a r~…ĺibuŇč jadańß ku nu r~…ĺikisi a kawaw, mańßiza ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ôt…ôp niza ku nikauzipan a mińß ¶aan maazińß niza ku nizat…ôŇčan amakawaw. ńßuŇčti pańßur~…ĺi ¶ r~…ĺ…ôk…ô atu tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan nu binawr~…ĺan r~…ĺ…ôk…ô mapar~…ĺańßad i r~…ĺow-kw a zidajan u saajawaj amin a naŇčatuan. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ye-han.low-ke "Ing a kamu John Locke, 1632 a mihca 8 a bulad 29 a demiad katukuh 1704 a mihca 10 a bulad 28 a demiad, FRS" singanganay Ing-kow ce-sye-cya, u pakaliliday u salingatuay ce-sye-cya, ahebal ku nipatinaku tu tekeday nizateng a wama. i tinengan, ci Low-ke atu ci Cyaw-ce.Peyke-ley,Ta-wi.Siw-mu tatulu a tademawan pala nu Ing-kow nitanengan a nizateng nu situngusay a tademaw, namahiza ci Low-ke i sakay a katatelekan mikawaw tu kahenulan a sapaayawan. palahad ciniza tu caca tuci Tang-ma-s.how-pu-s nu mahizaay a waway cayay kalecad ku nizateng, sakaku ku cen-hu uyza dada' maala ku pihang a sakuwan, asaca midiput tu tademaw amin a izaw ku uzip, sakaku, atu zaysangan pakuniza a situngusa, kya tatenga'ay situngu. . Low-ke patatenga' uyza pakala tu pihang a sapikuwan hawsa, syakay a katatelek kya patizeng, anu cangu'ut tu mahiniay a pihang, mahiza u tademaw a situngus pabelin tu cen-hu. Ye-han.low-ke u keynli nu kanatal pala hulickinen, sin-cen keyn atu hekalay keyn, sakaku sa pababenis patizeng tu hulic keyn atu sin-cen keyn, palalecad tu sin-cen keyn atu hekalay keyn, hulic keyn u satalakaway a keyli nu kanatal. . nikauzipan 1632 a mihca 8 a bulad 29 a demiad, Low-ke-sen i Sa-mu-say-te-cyun a Wi-lin-tun a niyazu', cacay u laed tu Pu-li-s-tow pakala tu 12 ing-li a kakitizaan. uyzaan demian masu-li. Low-ke a wama ci Ye-han.Low-ke ku ngnangan, Sa-mu-say-te-cyun mala tizaay ba-kown-su-ci a binkusi, na i Ing-kow kalalais mala u tatengilan a kapu nu mikuwanay tu hitay. Low-ke a wina ci Ay-ni-s.cin-en nu misanga'ay tu bukul a tataynaan a wawa, kukamu salungan sa,ux babalaki ni Low-ke hatu u cin-cyaw-tu. cay katenes lecuhan ci Low-ke, malimad kuheni tayza i Pu-li-s-tow sastimulan tu 7 ing-liay a Pung-s-bu-te-a niyazu', itiza i malukay a niyazu' balaki ci Low-ke. 1647 a mihcaan, i cabay nu wama, u tatengilan nu giing Ya-li-san-ta.Pow-pu-mu a pipadang tu kalisiw, ci Low-ke mapatayza i Lon-tun Si-mey micudad "Wi-s-mey-te" a cung-sye "Westminster School". Makay Si-mey cung-sye pahezek, Low-ke kilul pasayza micudad i Niw-cin talakaway a cacudadan ciwlu sye-yen. 1656 a mihcaan, ci Low-ke pakala tu sye-s-sye-wiy, kilul i 1658 a mihcaan pakala tu su-s-sye-wiy. tiza i Niw-cin katuud ku minanamay migingkiway tu imelang. asaca nakatuud ku singanganay a keseycye mahizaay ci Low-pow-te.Powi-al,Low-pow-te.Bud-ke kapulung a kawaw, 1656 a mihcaan ci Low-ke pakala tu i-sye-sye-s a sye-uyw. i 1666 a mihcaan, ci Low-ke amatineng tu ci Sa-bu-paw-pow-li-pow-cyean, ci Pow-cye itawya mangelu' kalalid nu atay a imelang, milayap tu pisapinang mingaay tu imelang ci Low-ke amikukay, uyzasa misungaay ci Low-kean mala u midapay niza. makilim tu ni Low-ke ku baluhay a sakawawan i 1667 a mihcaan malimad tayza Sa-bu-paw Pow-li-Pow-cye i Lun-tun a enengan, mala tekeday a misaydan ciniza. i Lun-tun, ci Low-ke i singanganan a misaydan ci Tang-ma-s. Si-te-na-mu a pipasubana' lalid sa migingkiw micuda tu i-cye, ci Si-te-lay-mu sakay ci Low-kean i pakuniza ce-syean a nizateng tabaki ku nikalilid, mahiniay a kalilid taneng i zikuz nisulitan ni Low-ke tu "amatineng tu tademawan a kamu" a cudad maazih. kapahay a cabay ni Low-ke ci Ma-sa-mu a tatayna mitakus ci Low-kean tayza i Ay-say-ke-s inakaay kakitizaay mueneng niza. kanahatu itawya uzip ni Low-ke namahiwhiw atahkal caay ka dungdung ku adada, mahiza tu u mala huy-ke-tang iyung a tademaw ciniza. uyni a demiadan ci Low-ke hina aci Ay-sa-ke.Niw-tun a tademawan matatengil tu cacanan a kamuan. makay 2691 a mihcaan malingatu ci Low-ke itiza i luma' ni Ma-sa a tataynaan. tuya a demiadan, u uzip ni Low-ke mangalengaleb pihaceng tu, zikuz i 1704 a mihca 10 a bulad 28 a demiad mumulay, tadem han i Ay-say-le-s-cyun sawalian nu Hay-bow-la-bow adidi'ay a niyazu' cacay nu kitizaan nu kiwkayay a tadem. tahazikuz caay ka siacawa, inayi' ku nisubelid tu canacana a wawaan. kanahatu nikauzipan ni Low-ke milihuza tu Wang-cen-bu-pi, Lon-tun tabakiay a libung yadah ku nu likisi a kawaw, mahiza caay kaletep niza ku nikauzipan a mihcaan maazih niza ku nizatengan amakawaw. Hungti pahulic leke atu tatengilan nu binawlan leke mapalahad i Low-kw a zidayan u saayaway amin a nangatuan. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

¶…ô-sj…ô- ¶ja, u pakar~…ĺir~…ĺidaj u sar~…ĺiŇčatuaj ¶…ô-sj…ô- ¶ja, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku nipatinaku tu t…ôk…ôdaj nizat…ôŇč a wama. i tin…ôŇčan, ¶i r~…ĺow-k…ô atu ¶i ¶jaw- ¶…ô.p…ôk…ô-r~…ĺ…ô,ta-wi.siw-mu ¶iniza tu ¶a ¶a tu ¶i taŇč-ma-s.ńßow-pu-s nu mańßizaaj a wawaj ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nizat…ôŇč, sakaku ku ¶…ôn-ńßu ujza dada Ē~ ° maar~…ĺa ku pińßaŇč a sakuwan, asa ¶a midiput tu tad…ômaw amin a izaw ku uzip, sakaku, atu zajsaŇčan pakuniza a situŇčusa, kja tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj situŇču. . r~…ĺow-k…ô patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ujza pakar~…ĺa tu pińßaŇč a sapikuwan ńßawsa, sjakaj a katat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk kja patiz…ôŇč, anu ¶aŇču Ē~ °ut tu mańßiniaj a pińßaŇč, mańßiza u tad…ômaw a situŇčus pab…ôr~…ĺin tu ¶…ôn-ńßu. j…ô-ńßan.r~…ĺow-k…ô u k…ônr~…ĺi nu kanatar~…ĺ par~…ĺa ńßur~…ĺi ¶kin…ôn, sin- ¶…ôn k…ôn atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj k…ôn, sakaku sa pabab…ônis patiz…ôŇč tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ k…ôn atu sin- ¶…ôn k…ôn, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu sin- ¶…ôn k…ôn atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj k…ôn, ńßur~…ĺi ¶ k…ôn u satar~…ĺakawaj a k…ôr~…ĺi nu kanatar~…ĺ. .
